delete.description: Deletes an existing poem authored by the authenticated user.

post.description: Saves a poem to the authenticated user's saved poems list.

delete.description: Removes a poem from the authenticated user's saved poems list.

post.description: Creates a new poem collection for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the list of poem collections belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a poem to a poem collection owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes a poem from a poem collection owned by the authenticated user.
Deletes a poem collection owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the list of poems authored by the authenticated user.

O mar respira lento
sob a lua cansada

get.description: Returns the list of published public poems authored by the specified author.

get.description: Returns the list of poems saved by the authenticated user.

post.description: Sends a friend request from the authenticated user to the target user.

patch.description: Accepts a friend request from the specified user to the authenticated user.
Rejects a friend request from the specified user to the authenticated user.
Blocks a user for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes the friendship between the authenticated user and the specified user.
Cancels a previously sent friend request from the authenticated user to the specified user.

patch.description: Unblocks a previously blocked user for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns friend requests sent and received by the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a like to a poem by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes a like from a poem by the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a comment to a poem by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a comment made by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Edits a comment made by the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a like to a comment by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes a like from a comment by the authenticated user.

post.description: Bans a user by the authenticated moderator.
Suspends a user by the authenticated moderator.

get.description: Retrieves home feed for authenticated user.

patch.description: Marks a specific notification as read for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Soft deletes a notification for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a single notification for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Marks all notifications as read for the authenticated user.

get.description: Lists notifications for the authenticated user, optionally filtering unread only.
